prompt:
A field sketch page showing the Orion Nebula as a soft central glow with faint wing structure and anchor stars around it. Pencil shading, small star dots, and a red flashlight nearby make it clearly a visual astronomy sketch made under changing seeing conditions.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft low light, realistic paper and graphite textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the page centered and uncluttered.
